text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The other day, Gold City's manager and I got
together to coordinate her schedule. However...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Lately, Gold City has been busy every second of
the day. I imagine it's physically taxing.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
I'm sorry, Trainer! I overslept! It's already past my
reserved time on the machine, but maybe we can
still get a spot?

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
Well... so much for that idea. There are no time
slots left.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
I'm sorry. Here I am, making you waste your time
too.
choice_data_list:
You're probably just exhausted from all the
recent work.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
Yeah, but I'm losing out. It's me who decided I
could do all this—running and modeling.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: Literally, how can I not even take proper care of myself? I have to get over this fatigue!
choice_data_list:
Don't be so hard on yourself. You'll just wind up
more exhausted.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
choice_data_list:
Besides, after that extra rest, you'll be able to
work harder during training!

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
You're right. I'll only be wasting time if I spend it
feeling sorry for myself.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
Okay. I'm back on my feet. What have you got for
me today, Trainer?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Shortly after, we manage to find an open training
facility to use.
